elections.note: Numerator = 113,925 'Cards Cast' from the registrar's own election-night results page (placerelections.com GEMS export), Wayback capture, report titled 'ELECTION NIGHT FINAL' with all 375 of 375 precincts reporting. This is the END-OF-ELECTION-NIGHT semi-official total (the complete election-night tally), NOT the literal 8 p.m. first tranche (Wayback did not capture the intermediate 8 p.m. state for this year; earliest non-zero snapshot is the frozen election-night-final report). Denominator = certified Total Voters 145,180 (Precinct 59,514 + VBM 85,666) from CA SoS 'Voter Participation Statistics by County.' Pre-VCA polling-place model. 113,925/145,180 = 78.5%.

Election-night numerator not sourceable. The registrar's election-night results page (placerelections.com) was captured by Wayback only PRE-poll-close (2012-11-03, 'Cards Cast 0', 0 of 350 precincts) and then not again until Dec 1-4, 2012, by which time the page already showed the 'OFFICIAL ELECTION SUMMARY' = certified final (172,757). No election-night (semi-official) snapshot was archived between poll close and certification, and the press releases / news for 2012 give no countywide first-report ballot count. Denominator = certified Total Voters 172,757 (Precinct 57,171 + VBM 115,586) from CA SoS 'Voter Participation Statistics by County' (independently confirmed by the Dec 2012 'OFFICIAL ELECTION SUMMARY' capture showing 172,757). Per rules, value left null rather than substituting the certified or a registered-voter denominator.

Numerator = 76,411 'Cards Cast' from the registrar's election-night results page (placerelections.com GEMS export), Wayback capture headed 'SEMI-OFFICIAL ELECTION SUMMARY / Election Night Final' with all 369 of 369 precincts reporting (48.13% reg turnout). This is the END-OF-ELECTION-NIGHT semi-official canvass total (the CA 'semi-official canvass' = the election-night count, frozen until replaced by the official canvass), NOT the literal 8 p.m. first tranche. Capture is dated 2014-11-15 but shows the frozen election-night-final report (76,411 << certified 115,547, confirming it is the election-night figure, not a mid-canvass update). Denominator = certified Total Voters 115,547 (Precinct 31,546 + VBM 84,001) from the CA SoS 2014 complete Statement of Vote, Voter Participation Statistics by County table (the standalone 03-participation PDF for 2014 was not separately reachable; figure read from the complete SOV). 76,411/115,547 = 66.1%.

Numerator = 109,666 'Cards Cast' from the registrar's election-night results page (placerelections.com GEMS export), Wayback capture headed 'SEMI-OFFICIAL ELECTION SUMMARY' with all 363 of 363 precincts reporting (48.43% reg turnout). END-OF-ELECTION-NIGHT semi-official canvass total (NOT the literal 8 p.m. first tranche). Earliest post-poll-close capture available is 2016-11-13; it shows the frozen election-night semi-official report (109,666 << certified 190,550); later Dec/Jan captures transition to the 'OFFICIAL ELECTION SUMMARY' final, confirming SEMI-OFFICIAL = the election-night figure. Denominator = certified Total Voters 190,550 (Precinct 58,385 + VBM 132,165) from CA SoS 'Voter Participation Statistics by County.' (v1 election-night/placer-ca.json had this year null; now sourced.) 109,666/190,550 = 57.6%.

Numerator = 113,380 'Cards Cast' from the registrar's election-night results page (placerelections.com, WordPress era), Wayback capture headed 'SEMI-OFFICIAL ELECTION SUMMARY' with all 358 of 358 precincts reporting (48.98% reg turnout). END-OF-ELECTION-NIGHT semi-official canvass total (NOT the literal 8 p.m. first tranche). Earliest post-poll-close capture is 2018-11-13, showing the frozen election-night semi-official report (113,380 << certified 177,725). Denominator = certified Total Voters 177,725 (Precinct 46,896 + VBM 130,829) from CA SoS 'Voter Participation Statistics by County.' 113,380/177,725 = 63.8%.

Numerator = ~49,000, the FIRST ~8:10 p.m. release ('nearly 49,000 mail-in and early voting ballots counted of the approximately 100,000 received so far'), Placer County news release. IMPORTANT REPORT-STAGE CAVEAT: this is the 8 p.m. FIRST tranche (pre-election VBM only), NOT the end-of-night total. Placer's 'unofficial election night report' was issued ~midnight-2 a.m. and was higher, but that end-of-night total was not archived (placerelections.com/placercountyelections.gov results pages have no captured election-night snapshot for 2022) and is not given in any press release. The 2010/2014/2016/2018 figures in this file are END-OF-NIGHT semi-official totals, so the 2022 (and 2024) value is NOT directly comparable to them without accounting for the earlier report stage. Denominator = certified Total Voters 184,507 (Precinct 25,494 + VBM 159,013) from CA SoS. ~49,000/184,507 = 26.6%.

Numerator = 104,382, the FIRST/initial post-poll-close release (exactly 104,382 vote-by-mail ballots submitted by mail or drop box before election day), Placer County news release. IMPORTANT REPORT-STAGE CAVEAT: this is the 8 p.m. FIRST tranche only; vote-center (in-person, Sign-Scan-&-Go) ballots were added in updates 'tentatively scheduled for 10 p.m. and 11:30 p.m.,' so the end-of-night total was higher but was not archived and is not stated in any press release (the earliest archived results-page snapshot is 2024-11-10 'UNOFFICIAL RESULTS - REPORT 7' = 182,129, well past election night). Because the pre-2020 figures in this file are END-OF-NIGHT semi-official totals while this is the 8 p.m. first tranche, the raw 2024 percentage is NOT directly comparable to the pre-2020 baseline; a like-stage 2024 end-of-night number could not be sourced. First even-year general under VCA vote centers + DFM e-pollbooks (adopted 2024) + AB 626 Sign-Scan-&-Go. Denominator = certified Total Voters 239,402 (Precinct/vote-center 56,964 + VBM 182,438) from CA SoS. 104,382/239,402 = 43.6%.
